title: Programming Fundamentals
description: Variables, data types, the three fundamental control structures, operators, functions and lists — the core building blocks of every Python program.
objectives: Declare and use variables of type int, float, str and bool, and predict the result of type conversions
Use arithmetic, comparison and Boolean (and/or/not) operators, and evaluate compound conditions
Write selection using if/elif/else and iteration using for and while, choosing the right structure for a problem
Trace the execution of a program by hand and predict its output and final variable values
Define functions with parameters and return values, and explain the difference between a parameter and an argument
Create, index and iterate over 1D and simple 2D lists
